faqs.question: How long does it take to set up Dooyt?
faqs.answer: Most businesses are up and running within 1–2 weeks. Our onboarding team guides you through data migration, module configuration, and user training. Enterprise deployments with custom integrations typically take 4–6 weeks.

faqs.question: Can I switch plans later?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When upgrading, you get immediate access to new features and the price difference is prorated. Downgrading takes effect at the start of your next billing cycle.

faqs.question: Is my data secure?
faqs.answer: Security is our top priority. We use AES-256 encryption at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit, and maintain SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 certifications. Data is backed up hourly with point-in-time recovery available for the last 30 days.

faqs.question: Do you offer API access for custom integrations?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our Professional and Enterprise plans include full REST API access with comprehensive documentation. You can integrate Dooyt with your existing tools, build custom workflows, and create automated data pipelines.

faqs.question: What kind of support do you provide?
faqs.answer: Starter plans include email support (24-hour response time). Professional plans get priority support with live chat (4-hour response). Enterprise customers receive a dedicated account manager and 24/7 phone support with a 1-hour SLA.

faqs.question: Can Dooyt handle multi-currency and multi-language?
faqs.answer: Yes! Dooyt supports 50+ currencies with automatic exchange rate updates and is available in 12 languages. Multi-entity setups can operate in different currencies with consolidated reporting in your base currency.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: We offer a 14-day free trial on all plans with full feature access — no credit card required. You can also book a personalized demo with our team to see how Dooyt fits your specific business needs.
